top_signals.title: Bank of Russia governor says ‘everything is ready’ for widespread use of digital ruble ahead of September rollout
top_signals.summary: The central bank is also actively discussing the use of stablecoins for international settlements, but only to complement the digital ruble.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin price tags $62.3K nine-day high after global stocks hit historic record
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin set new highs for July after the Dow Jones and global stocks market cap set new all-time highs before the US Independence Day holiday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: National Payments Vision
top_signals.summary: The government has published the National Payments Vision, setting out its ambitions for the UK’s payments sector to deliver world-leading payments and support the growth mission.

top_signals.title: Argentina Extends $6 Billion in Repo Maturities Beyond Election
top_signals.summary: Argentina’s central bank extended maturities worth $6 billion on its repurchase agreements — or repos — to ease the government debt burden going into the 2027 presidential election.

top_signals.title: Citi Says Oil May Slump to $60 as the Hormuz Shock Fades Away - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Citi Says Oil May Slump to $60 as the Hormuz Shock Fades Away  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Anthropic moves to close loopholes that allow Chinese access to Claude - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: Anthropic moves to close loopholes that allow Chinese access to Claude  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: PJM on Maximum Alert to Prevent Outages Amid Extreme Heat Wave
top_signals.summary: PJM Interconnection, the operator of the largest U.S. electric grid, has issued a maximum generation alert for July 3 asking power producers to maximize electricity generation amid soaring demand in the current extreme heat wave. PJM had a Maximum Generation Alert and Load Management Alert in effect for July 2 across its footprint in the eastern U.S. and Midwest. These alerts have now been issued for the PJM footprint for July 3, too. While the alert does not require any action from customers, generators and transmission owners are asked to maximize…
